coverage_gate_verdict.overall_target_99: MISS — 81.45% excluding generated, 51.29% including; gap concentrated in features (61%), router (54%), core (77%)
coverage_gate_verdict.router_target_100: MISS — 54.29% (unchanged from prior run; no route-by-route parametrized test added)

golden_tests_status.gap: Only 6 screens have goldens (spec wanted golden-per-widget); per-locale stealth goldens for 14 locales NOT present

a11y_tests_status.coverage_scope: Font scaling + Semantics on key widgets; NO TalkBack/VoiceOver manual evidence
a11y_tests_status.gap: Plan wanted deep a11y review across all 31 screens; current 2 files spot-check only

widget_tests_per_screen.only_missing: lib/features/session/session_screen.dart (has golden test but no regular widget test)

findings.issue: Session screen (lib/features/session/session_screen.dart) is at 0.91% coverage (1/110 lines). This is the single most-critical user-facing screen. It has a golden test but NO regular widget test that drives state transitions, HoldButton interaction, distress confirmation flow, or PIN-entry flow.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test/features/session/session_screen_test.dart with ProviderContainer overrides to exercise: HoldMode render, DateMode render, distress confirmation render, pause banner (incoming call), disarm action. This alone would lift features/ coverage by ~2pp.

findings.issue: 4 Modes-feature widgets are at 0% coverage: chain_step_tile.dart, step_type_picker.dart, step_config_form.dart, event_specific_config.dart (226 lines alone in the last). These are pulled in from mode_editor_screen.dart which has its own 47.92% coverage. No dedicated test for step-config rendering.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test/features/modes/widgets/ with one test file per widget. event_specific_config.dart alone covers 226 lines — getting it to even 70% lifts features/ by ~2.5pp.

findings.issue: lib/core/widgets/pin_entry_dialog.dart is at 0% (53 lines). It wraps Argon2id verification in a dialog — no unit test asserts the duress-PIN silent branch, the app/session/duress PIN selection paths, or the close behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test/core/widgets/pin_entry_dialog_test.dart: (a) enter correct PIN → Navigator.pop(true), (b) enter wrong PIN 3x → threshold triggers distress hook, (c) enter duress PIN → silently fires distress without UI feedback, (d) cancel → pop(false).

findings.issue: Engine at 98.96% (below 100% gate). session_engine.dart has 3 uncovered lines and engine_state.dart has 1. These are the plan's tightest gate.
findings.suggested_fix: Run lcov_cobertura genhtml to locate the 4 uncovered lines; add targeted tests for defensive fall-through or formally exempt per §9.2 with a // COVERAGE comment.

findings.issue: Orchestration at 98.75% (below 100% gate). session_orchestrator.dart (94.44%, 2 lines) + event_strategy_registry.dart (90.91%, 1 line) are the holdouts.
findings.suggested_fix: Cover the remaining 3 lines or exempt per §9.2.

findings.issue: Models at 99.11% (below 100% gate). 8 model files <100%: distress_chain (89.29%), app_defaults (93.02%), stealth_config (94.34%), location_point (96.43%), mode_overrides (98.00%), user_profile (98.33%), event_defaults (98.53%), step_config (99.21%).
findings.suggested_fix: Add ~17 targeted tests for serialization edge cases (null fields, missing keys, unknown step types) across the 8 files.

findings.issue: Router still at 54.29% — NO dedicated app_router_test.dart parametrized over every RouteName. Only integration coverage hits the boot route. redirect branches and first-launch detection unexercised. File test/router/app_router_test.dart exists but only covers a subset of routes.
findings.suggested_fix: Extend test/router/app_router_test.dart to iterate over ALL 31 RouteName entries, verify resolved screen type. Add explicit first-launch redirect tests.

findings.issue: Core at 76.53%. Gaps: pin_entry_dialog (0%), distress_confirmation (63.27%), sentry_config (44.44%), structured_logger (73.91%), logarithmic_slider (83.33%), platform_info (83.33%).
findings.suggested_fix: Lift pin_entry_dialog to 80%+ (biggest gain: 53 lines at 0%), extend distress_confirmation for stealth mode, add telemetry test for prod-only Sentry init branches.

findings.issue: Services at 91.37% (below 99% gate). 4 files <90%: audio_service (37.84%, 23 uncovered lines — TTS fallback branch), notification_service (34.62%, 51 uncovered — custom sound / disguise permutations), vibration_service (80.00%), home_widget_service (88.24%).
findings.suggested_fix: Add MethodChannel mock tests for audio TTS fallback and notification disguise variants.

findings.issue: Features at 61.44% overall (below 99% gate). Biggest drags: session_screen (0.91%, 110 lines), backup_screen (23.46%), battery_alert_screen (48.21%), onboarding_screen (51.00%), pin_setup_screen (30.00%), mode_editor_screen (47.92%), distress_chain_editor_screen (50.00%), contacts_screen (55.81%).
findings.suggested_fix: Prioritize session_screen (0% → 70% = +2.2pp), backup_screen (23% → 80% = +0.8pp), onboarding_screen (51% → 85% = +0.6pp). Each uses ProviderContainer.overrideWith in the existing test/features pattern.

findings.issue: flutter analyze reports 3 ERRORS in Patrol integration_test files (D7 E2E): extra_positional_arguments_could_be_named at integration_test/date_mode_flow_test.dart:43, distress_flow_test.dart:30 and :60. These fail the universal gate `flutter analyze --fatal-infos`.
findings.suggested_fix: Convert `$.pumpAndSettle(const Duration(...))` to `$.pumpAndSettle(duration: const Duration(...))` — the walk_mode_flow_test.dart file was already migrated (per prior edit), migrate the other two.

findings.issue: test-strategy §2.1 claimed target 180 files / 3830 cases with 99% coverage. Current 138 files / 1691 cases reaches 81.45% on code-only (excl. generated). Gap of ~2100 cases between plan target and actual. Plan target is still unmet.
findings.suggested_fix: Either execute a focused test-depth pass on features/router/core to reach 99% on code-only, OR formally lower the overall gate (with a D-ID) to 80% code-only + 100% on correctness-critical paths. Document the decision in decisions-log.md.

findings.issue: Prior finding about sms_contact_strategy_test only asserting count strings ('sendToAll:2') instead of per-channel per-contact tuples REMAINS unaddressed. FakeMessagingService still records aggregate counts.
findings.suggested_fix: Upgrade FakeMessagingService to record List<(contactId, channel, body)> tuples.

quality_observations.fixed_random_discipline: Strong — continues to eliminate jitter nondeterminism
quality_observations.fake_async_discipline: Strong — used consistently in engine + integration tests
quality_observations.error_path_coverage: Good for engine and data-layer; weaker for feature controllers
quality_observations.pattern_strategy_exhaustive: Yes — one test file per ChainStepType strategy (9/9)
quality_observations.widget_tests: 30 of 31 screens covered (session_screen is the gap)
quality_observations.property_tests: 1 file covering 15 models; N-count still small
quality_observations.patrol_e2e: Present (4 files in integration_test/) — walk_mode, date_mode, distress_flow, app_test
quality_observations.test_suite_is_stable: Yes — 1691/1691 passing; tests run in ~2m5s on cold cache

open_questions: Should the 99% overall coverage gate be enforced strictly (requiring ~400-600 more widget tests) or redefined to 99% on correctness-critical paths only (engine/orchestration/models/data/services) with a lower gate on UI features (e.g. 80%)?
The 3 Patrol analyzer errors need to be fixed before CI can pass on the `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` gate — should these files be temporarily excluded from analyzer, or fixed?
session_screen.dart widget test is the single highest-value test-authoring opportunity — who owns it?
